name: ConvertKit
description: Connects to ConvertKit via the REST API v3 to sync subscribers, sequences, forms, tags, and broadcasts into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: Your ConvertKit API Key. Found in ConvertKit → Settings → Advanced → API Key.

install_fields.label: API Secret
install_fields.help: Your ConvertKit API Secret. Required to list subscribers. Found in ConvertKit → Settings → Advanced → API Secret.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate the API key via GET /v3/account. Returns HEALTHY/CONNECTED or OFFLINE with the failure reason.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /v3/account and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE with the account name/email.

methods.name: Sync
methods.description: Full sync: fetches all subscribers (page-paginated), sequences, and forms. Normalizes each to a ConnectorDocument.

methods.name: List Subscribers
methods.description: Page-based paginated list of ConvertKit subscribers.

methods.name: Get Subscriber
methods.description: Retrieve a single subscriber by ID.

methods.name: List Broadcasts
methods.description: List all ConvertKit broadcasts (one-off emails sent).
